summary.goal: Audit and correct memex graph parent misassignments
decisions: Identified three misassignments by cross-referencing graph.json edges against node goals, git log, and the dependency-first parent rule in CLAUDE.md
18f50221 (--summary param) reparented from 173a43aa (docs) to 925f8e38 (rename): code feature should not depend on an unrelated documentation node
97071768 (--goal guidance) reparented from 9f869ab8 (--depth N code) to 173a43aa (parent guidance docs): workflow docs extend prior workflow docs, not an unrelated code feature
51674117 (LICENSE) reparented from root 0063801a to af5774e3 (CI check): LICENSE was the last node created but floated off the project root — should attach to the project tip at the time of creation

rejected_approaches.description: Reparent LICENSE to 269bfac9 (parent node examples) as the most recent resolved node
rejected_approaches.reason: Chronological recency is not the right criterion — LICENSE has no dependency on parent-selection docs either; af5774e3 (CI check) was the actual project tip when LICENSE was added

rejected_approaches.description: Leave the linear chain intact (4c5d17 → f5d7a9 → 9f869a → 970717 → d85b81) without correction
rejected_approaches.reason: 970717 (--goal guidance) is a docs node chained after a code feature it has no relationship to; the chain obscures that the docs work extends 173a43aa
d85b81 and 970717 were committed on the same git branch and d85b81 was resolved immediately after; the chaining is coherent as both are workflow/settings work
